WITN09900100
WITN09900100

11. Since leaving POL in May 2020, after a short period as Head of People with the Football Association of Wales (December 2020 – March 2021), I have operated as a freelance HR Consultant.

THE HORIZON IT SYSTEM

12. In respect of the Horizon IT System, the Inquiry have provided me with the following documents, which I have reviewed and reflected on below:

a. POL00178199 (email from Clive Burton to me on 19 March 2004);
b. POL00041564 (Computer Weekly article dated 11 May 2009);
c. POL00026572 (Rod Ismay Report dated 2 August 2010);
d. POL00088956 and POL00088957 (emails from John Breeden to me on 5 December 2010); and
e. POL00294728 (email from Tracy Marshall to me on 5 January 2011).

13. Document POL00178199 (email from Clive Burton to me on 19 March 2004) refers to a Mrs Pugh, who was a SPM at Chirbury Post Office from 21 April 1999 to 3 September 2001, when her contract for services was suspended. The email requests assistance with obtaining information to assist the Legal Services Department with preparing statements for Mrs Pugh's Court case, relating to her final audit and the Post Office accounting system. I did not
